business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

positives: Alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Prior 3 years show zero claims and no cancellations
concerns: Buildings are not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
EV charging stations not installed on premises
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) are permitted
One manufacturing location built in 1992 and one in 1998
One listed manufacturing location is not sprinklered
Written contracts with all subcontractors: No
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history on page 2 shows 0 claims for 2022, 2023, and 2024, with no cancellations.
